w2:box1.label: Wages, tips, other comp.
w2:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta aad shaqadaada ka heshay sanadkan oo dhan, ka hor inta aan canshuurta laga jarin.
w2:box1.en: This is the total money you earned from your job this year, before any taxes were taken out.

w2:box2.label: Federal income tax withheld
w2:box2.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray, oo uu dawladda kuugu diray.
w2:box2.en: This is the federal tax your employer already took out of your paychecks and sent to the government for you.

w2:box3.label: Social security wages
w2:box3.so: Tani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Social Security — lacag ku taageeraysa marka aad hawlgabto.
w2:box3.en: This is the part of your pay counted toward Social Security — money that helps support you when you retire.

w2:box4.label: Social security tax withheld
w2:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta Social Security ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box4.en: This is the Social Security tax amount your employer took out of your pay.

w2:box5.label: Medicare wages & tips
w2:box5.so: Tani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Medicare — kaasoo gaashaan caafimaadka.
w2:box5.en: This is the part of your pay counted toward Medicare — health insurance for seniors.

w2:box6.label: Medicare tax withheld
w2:box6.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta Medicare ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box6.en: This is the Medicare tax amount your employer took out of your pay.

w2:box7.label: Social security tips
w2:box7.so: Tani waa qaybta khadarkaaga (tips) ee loo xisaabiyo Social Security.
w2:box7.en: This is the part of your reported tips counted toward Social Security.

w2:box8.label: Allocated tips
w2:box8.so: Tani waa khadar (tips) loo-shaqeeyahaagu kuu qoondeeyay, oo aadan horay u sheegin — waa inaad ku daraysaa dakhligaaga.
w2:box8.en: These are tips your employer assigned to you that you didn't report yourself — you need to add them to your income.

w2:box10.label: Dependent care benefits
w2:box10.so: Tani waa lacagta loo-shaqeeyahaagu bixiyay si lagu daryeelo carruurtaada ama qof kale oo aad masuul ka tahay, intii aad shaqaynaysay.
w2:box10.en: This is money your employer provided to help pay for the care of your children or another dependent while you worked.

w2:box11.label: Nonqualified plans
w2:box11.so: Tani waa lacag laga bixiyay qorshe hawlgab oo aan caadiga ahayn — way ku jirtaa mushaharkaaga la canshuuro.
w2:box11.en: This is money paid to you from a nonqualified retirement plan — it's already included in your taxable wages.

w2:box13.label: Checkboxes
w2:box13.so: Sanduuqani waxay tilmaamaysaa haddii aad tahay shaqaale gaar ah, mid ka mid ah qorshe hawlgab, ama haddii cudur-bixinta dhaqsaha ah ay bixiso shirkad saddexaad.
w2:box13.en: These checkboxes flag special situations: being a statutory employee, being part of a retirement plan, or sick pay handled by a third party.

w2:box14.label: Other
w2:box14.so: Tani waa nooc kale oo lacag ah oo loo-shaqeeyahaagu rabo inuu kuu sheego, sida kharashka ururka shaqaalaha (union dues) — sharaxaadu way ku xardhan tahay sanduuqa.
w2:box14.en: This box lists other amounts your employer wants you to know about, like union dues — the description is printed right in the box.

w2:box15.label: State & employer's state ID
w2:box15.so: Tani waa stateka loo-shaqeeyahaagu canshuurta uga jaray, iyo lambarkiisa diiwaangashan ee stateka.
w2:box15.en: This is the state your employer withheld taxes for, plus their state-registered ID number.

w2:box16.label: State wages, tips, etc.
w2:box16.so: Tani waa lacagta mushaharkaaga ee dowladda lagaga jaray canshuurta stateka.
w2:box16.en: This is the wages your state counted for calculating state income tax.

w2:box17.label: State income tax withheld
w2:box17.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta stateka ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box17.en: This is the state income tax your employer took out of your paychecks.

w2:box18.label: Local wages, tips, etc.
w2:box18.so: Tani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo canshuurta magaalada ama degmada.
w2:box18.en: This is the part of your wages counted for local (city or county) income tax.

w2:box19.label: Local income tax withheld
w2:box19.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta magaalada ama degmada ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box19.en: This is the local (city or county) income tax your employer took out of your pay.

w2:box20.label: Locality name
w2:box20.so: Tani waa magaca magaalada ama degmada ee canshuurta sanduuqa 19 loo bixiyay.
w2:box20.en: This is the name of the city or county that the box 19 tax was paid to.
